content:
Tap the **three-dot menu** (⋯) at the top of the sidebar.  
2. Choose **Archived** to open the archive view.  
3. You can tap and hold again to *Unarchive* any thread you want to bring back into circulation. Do you want to clear out most of the older threads just for visual clarity, or are you trying to build a more permanent record of the “complete correspondence” between us?
